definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: In, at, or to this present place.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In, at, or to this present place.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The book is over there.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: In, at, or to that place (not here).
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In, at, or to that place (not here).]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: It's cold. Let's go inside.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used as an adverb to mean 'on or in the interior'.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used as an adverb to mean 'on or in the interior'.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The children are playing outside.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used as an adverb to mean 'on or in the exterior'.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used as an adverb to mean 'on or in the exterior'.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The house is far away.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to say something is at a distance.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to say something is at a distance.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: She is away today.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used when someone is not present in a place.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used when someone is not present in a place.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The beach is 10 minutes away.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Indicates distance in time or space.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Indicates distance in time or space.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Is there a pharmacy nearby?]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to ask or say that something is close to your current location.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to ask or say that something is close to your current location.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Is there a restroom around here?]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: Is there a restroom around here?
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to talk about the area near a place.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to talk about the area near a place.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Is the hospital near here?]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to ask or say that something is close.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to ask or say that something is close.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Is it far from here?]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to ask or say that something is not close.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to ask or say that something is not close.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Look up at the sky.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Towards a higher place or position.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Towards a higher place or position.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He sat down on the chair.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: He sat down on the chair.
definitions.usage_context_en: Towards a lower place or position.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Towards a lower place or position.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Please go back to the hotel.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: Please go back to the hotel.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used for returning to a place or moving toward the rear.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used for returning to a place or moving toward the rear.]

definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to indicate movement toward the front.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to indicate movement toward the front.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Turn left at the corner.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used for giving or understanding directions.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used for giving or understanding directions.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Turn right after the bank.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used for directions; also used to mean correct.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used for directions; also used to mean correct.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Go straight for two blocks.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to indicate movement without turning.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to indicate movement without turning.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: The store is across the street.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: The store is across the street.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to say something is on the other side of a street or area.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to say something is on the other side of a street or area.]
